raw.n: BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency

summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2036 Term Treasury ETF (IBTR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE 2036 Maturity US Treasury index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds maturing between January and December 2036. The fund will terminate in December 2036.
